parameters.Description: 模擬非加壓機艙或高海拔運輸環境
parameters.Temperature: 依據所選氣候區決定 (通常配合低溫)

tests.Condition: Maintain 57.2 kPa for minimum 1 hour

parameters.Description: 模擬設備於高海拔地區正常運作
parameters.Altitude: 4,572 m (15,000 ft) 或依據系統規格

tests.Condition: Perform functional test while at minimum pressure

parameters.Description: 模擬飛機加壓艙突然破裂 (爆發性減壓)

tests.Condition: Rapid drop from 8,000ft to 40,000ft within 15 seconds

parameters.Description: 多數地區 (不含極端沙漠) 的標準高溫倉儲 (Table 501.5-II)
極端沙漠氣候高溫倉儲 (如中東、北非) (Table 501.5-II)
標準高溫運作環境

tests.Condition: Temperature rate of change < 2.0°C/hour
Operate at peak temperature for minimum 2 hours

parameters.Description: 涵蓋多數歐洲及北美之標準低溫倉儲 (Table 502.5-I)

tests.Condition: Maintain -33°C for 24 hours

parameters.Description: 極寒地區 (如阿拉斯加、西伯利亞) 倉儲

tests.Condition: Maintain -46°C for 24 hours

parameters.Description: 標準低溫開機與運作

tests.Condition: Power on and maintain operation until thermally stabilized

parameters.Description: 模擬設備僅經歷一次極端的溫度轉換（如從溫暖機艙空投至極寒高空）

tests.Condition: Transfer from T-initial to T-final within 1 min
Hold at T-final until thermally stabilized

parameters.Description: 模擬單次來回的溫度衝擊（例如起飛至高空後再降落回地面）

tests.Condition: Ambient to Extreme 1, hold until stable
Extreme 1 to Extreme 2, hold until stable
Extreme 2 back to Ambient

parameters.Description: 模擬航空運輸或極端環境中的快速溫變

tests.Action: Transfer from -51°C to 71°C within 1 min, hold until stabilized
Conduct visual and functional test after 3 full cycles

parameters.Description: 模擬設備在自然氣候中經歷數十天的日夜溫濕度緩慢變化 (Table 507.6-I)
parameters.Cycle Profile: Continuous 24-hour variation tracking real-world climatic data
parameters.Test Duration: Up to 45 cycles (1080 hours) for severe environments

tests.Condition: Follow specified 24-hr temperature/humidity profile (e.g., B3 Damp Tropical)

parameters.Description: 加速驗證產品對濕氣穿透與腐蝕的抵抗力

tests.Condition: 30°C to 60°C over 2 hours, RH > 95%
Maintain 60°C at 95% RH for 6 hours
60°C to 30°C over 8 hours, RH > 85%
Maintain 30°C at 95% RH for 8 hours

parameters.Description: 一般輪型車輛路面運輸 (固定貨物) (Figure 514.7C-1,2,3)
噴射貨機運輸環境 (Figure 514.7D-1)

tests.Profile: Low level random profile per specific aircraft

parameters.Description: 直升機機載設備震動 (Sine-on-Random 混合波型) (Figure 514.7D-3)
parameters.Rotor Frequency: Determined by specific helicopter blade pass frequency (e.g., 1P, 2P, 4P)

tests.Condition: Vibration levels are dependent on materiel mounting location and aircraft specific rotor speeds

parameters.Description: 安裝於輪型或履帶車輛上的設備於越野或顛簸路面行駛之震動 (Figure 514.7E-1)
最低基本完整性測試 (非特定運輸環境，確保基本組裝品質) (Figure 514.7E-1)

tests.Profile: 0.04 g²/Hz from 20 to 1000Hz, rolling off at -6dB/octave to 2000Hz

parameters.Description: 未固定的鬆散貨物在車輛運輸過程中的彈跳與碰撞測試 (Figure 514.7C-4)
parameters.Motion: 25.4 mm (1.0 inch) peak-to-peak circular synchronous motion
parameters.Frequency: Typically 4 to 5 Hz (240 to 300 RPM to achieve 1/16 inch gap)

tests.Condition: Item must be free to bounce, strike the bed, and collide with fences

parameters.Description: 模擬設備運作時可能遭遇的碰撞或衝擊 (確保結構與功能正常)

tests.Condition: +X (3 shocks), -X (3 shocks) while operating
+Y (3 shocks), -Y (3 shocks) while operating
+Z (3 shocks), -Z (3 shocks) while operating

parameters.Description: 在產品尚未加上緩衝包裝前進行的衝擊測試，以決定後續所需的包裝保護等級
parameters.Pulse Shape: Tailored to expected handling environment (e.g., half-sine or sawtooth)

tests.Condition: Subject bare materiel to shocks representing logistical handling
Determine minimum packaging mitigation requirements based on damage limits

parameters.Description: 破壞性測試，用於精確找出產品的「臨界損壞界線」(Fragility Level)
parameters.Step Increment: Gradually increase shock severity (velocity change and peak acceleration)

tests.Condition: Increase velocity change until critical velocity (Vc) is found
Increase peak acceleration until critical acceleration (Ac) is found

parameters.Description: 模擬設備在物流搬運、裝卸過程中的意外跌落 (Table 516.7-VI)
parameters.Number of Drops: 26 drops (Covering all faces, edges, and corners)

tests.Drop Height: 61 cm (24 inches) - Drops determined by handling equipment limitations

parameters.Description: 模擬載具發生墜毀事故時，確保設備不會脫落變成高速拋射物傷及乘員 (非運作測試)

tests.Condition: Apply crash profile to mounting points
Verify equipment remains captive on its mounts and does not shed hazardous parts

parameters.Description: 模擬設備在工作台上進行維修、組裝或檢驗時的意外傾倒或滑落
parameters.Drop Surface: Solid wood bench top at least 4.25 cm (1.675 inches) thick

tests.Condition: Raise opposite edge until 45 degrees or balance point, let drop freely
Raise opposite edge to 10 cm (4 inches) above bench, let drop freely
Repeat for all practical edges on the base face

parameters.Description: 針對體積龐大且沉重（超過 454 公斤），無法在一般跌落機台上測試的大型貨物
parameters.Impact Velocity: Equivalent to specified drop heights for the item's weight class
parameters.Barrier: Solid concrete or steel unyielding barrier

tests.Condition: Suspend the test item by cables so it acts as a pendulum
Pull back and release to strike the barrier at the target velocity on all 4 sides

parameters.Description: 專屬海軍航空兵：模擬艦載機在航空母艦上透過彈射器起飛，以及捕捉索降落時產生的極端縱向瞬態衝擊
parameters.Acceleration Profile: Specific to aircraft platform and catapult/arresting gear system
parameters.Mounting: Must replicate exact aircraft structural mounting dynamics

tests.Condition: Apply specified longitudinal acceleration transient mimicking steam or EMALS catapult
Apply specified deceleration transient mimicking arresting wire engagement

parameters.Description: 模擬戶外設備遭遇狂風暴雨的環境

tests.Condition: Continuous spray with specified wind velocity

parameters.Description: 模擬設備處於有遮蔽物的環境（如機艙內、帳篷內），受到上方冷凝水或輕微漏水的滴落
parameters.Water Pressure: Falling from dispenser located 1 meter above test item

tests.Condition: Subject item to steady drip for 15 minutes
Verify no water pooling or ingress affecting safety/function

parameters.Description: 加速評估保護性塗層與表面處理的抗腐蝕能力

tests.Condition: 24 hours continuous salt fog spray
24 hours at standard ambient conditions
Repeat Exposure and Drying for a total of 2 cycles (96 hours)

parameters.Description: 模擬設備在乾燥、微塵環境中的運作與防塵能力 (< 149 μm)

tests.Condition: 6 hours at standard ambient temperature
6 hours at high operating temperature

parameters.Description: 模擬設備遭遇強風捲起較大沙粒的侵蝕與穿透效應 (150 to 850 μm)
parameters.Wind Velocity: 18 m/s to 29 m/s (40 mph to 65 mph)

tests.Condition: 90 minutes per vulnerable face

parameters.Description: 模擬設備部分或完全浸入水中的密封性
parameters.Water Depth: 1 meter (3.3 feet) covering the uppermost point
parameters.Temperature Differential: Test item temperature 27°C above water temperature

tests.Condition: Heat test item to establish temperature differential
Submerge for 30 minutes, observe for bubbles/leaks

parameters.Description: 模擬設備偶爾暴露於化學流體（如潤滑油、燃料、清潔劑）的抵抗力
parameters.Fluid Temperature: Standard Ambient or Specific Operating Temp
parameters.Exposure Time: 8 to 24 hours depending on fluid type

tests.Condition: Apply specified fluid to completely cover vulnerable surfaces
Maintain at test temperature for 8 hours
Inspect for material degradation, swelling, or structural failure

parameters.Description: 評估太陽輻射產生的熱效應（如外殼變形、內部過熱）

tests.Condition: Continuous 24-hr cycles of varying irradiance and temperature
Operate equipment during peak temperature and irradiance phase

parameters.Description: 評估太陽輻射造成的化學/光化學破壞（如褪色、塑膠脆化）

tests.Condition: 20 hours of continuous irradiance
4 hours of darkness per cycle to allow thermal gradients to dissipate

parameters.Description: 評估設備材質是否會支持黴菌生長並導致功能損壞

tests.Condition: Spray mixed spore suspension evenly over test item
Maintain 30°C and >95% RH for 28 days
Visual inspection by trained mycologist (Do not wipe or clean before inspection)

parameters.Description: 驗證設備在充滿易燃油氣的環境中運作時，不會產生火花引燃爆炸
parameters.Altitude Limits: Site ambient up to 12,192 m (40,000 ft)
parameters.Temperature: Maximum operating temperature of the test item

tests.Condition: Introduce explosive mixture at simulated altitudes
Operate test item, actuating all switches and contacts
Detonate mixture at end of test to verify mixture was explosive

parameters.Description: 模擬航空器高G力轉向時的結構與功能承受力
parameters.Acceleration Level: Dependent on aircraft type (e.g., 9G for fighters)

tests.Condition: Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating
Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating
Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating

parameters.Description: 模擬設備暴露於高強度聲波場（如飛機引擎、火箭發射）引起的微震動與疲勞
parameters.Duration: 30 minutes per condition (or specific flight profile)

tests.Condition: Subject to broad-band random acoustic noise field
Check for acoustic-induced fatigue and component chafing

parameters.Description: 模擬爆炸螺栓或分離火工品引爆時產生的高頻、高G值衝擊
parameters.Frequency Range: Up to 1,000,000 Hz (Typically analyzed to 100,000 Hz)

tests.Condition: Initiate pyrotechnic device in actual or mock-up structural configuration
High-speed transient data acquisition (min 1M samples/sec)

parameters.Description: 評估設備在酸性氣體（如燃燒廢氣、工業污染）下的抗腐蝕與抗化學破壞能力

tests.Condition: 3 periods of 2 hours spraying followed by 22 hours storage
72 hours minimum

parameters.Description: 模擬機載或車載機砲連續射擊產生的週期性強烈震動與衝擊波
parameters.Firing Rate: Repetitive pulse (e.g., 20 to 100 Hz corresponding to gun firing rate)
parameters.Duration: Equivalent to actual mission firing time

tests.Condition: Apply specified gunfire shock response spectrum (SRS)

parameters.Description: 模擬飛行器在實際任務中同時遭遇溫度、濕度、震動與氣壓變化的複合影響
parameters.Transition Rates: Dependent on specific aircraft climb/dive capabilities

tests.Condition: Simultaneous application of vibration, thermal, and altitude stress
Continuously operate and monitor during cycle

parameters.Description: 驗證設備在結冰環境下（如除冰設備、天線）的操作與解凍效能
parameters.Ice Thickness: 13 mm (0.5 in) for general equipment, up to 75 mm (3 in) for marine

tests.Condition: Stabilize test item below freezing
Spray super-cooled water until desired thickness is achieved
Attempt to operate equipment or deploy de-icing mechanisms

parameters.Description: 模擬裝甲車輛遭受到非貫穿性彈砲擊中時，裝甲傳遞的高頻破壞性衝擊
parameters.Shock Level: Very high momentum exchange (SRS often > 10,000 g at high frequencies)
parameters.Simulator: Ballistic shock machine (BSM) or light gas gun

tests.Condition: Apply specified SRS profile to item mounting points
Verify structural integrity and absence of hazardous fragment shedding

parameters.Description: 專門用於掛載於軍機外部的裝備（飛彈、莢艙），綜合氣動噪音、震動與溫度的破壞
parameters.Acoustic: Engine exhaust and boundary layer noise

tests.Condition: Simultaneous application of three stresses per mission profile

parameters.Description: 模擬環境水分滲入設備縫隙後結冰膨脹，再融化產生的物理結構破壞

tests.Condition: Repeated transition between freezing and thawing
Inspect for cracked seals, housing separation, and component distortion

parameters.Description: 將實地錄製的複雜時域波形（而非簡化的頻譜）直接在實驗室振動台上重播

tests.Condition: Determine system transfer function using low-level random
Iteratively correct drive signal to match target field waveform

parameters.Description: 模擬火車車廂在調車場進行連結作業時的劇烈縱向撞擊

tests.Condition: Subject test item to specified impact velocity in both longitudinal directions

parameters.Description: 多軸多激振器同步測試，模擬比單軸更真實的 3D 空間複合動態破壞

tests.Condition: Simultaneous control of phase and amplitude across multiple shakers

parameters.Description: 專門規範美國海軍水面艦與潛艦搭載設備的長期環境與螺旋槳激振力
parameters.Amplitude: Displacement controlled (e.g., up to 0.030 inches single amplitude)
parameters.Excitation Source: Ship propulsion systems and wave action

tests.Condition: Identify resonances between 4 to 50 Hz
Sweep and dwell at identified shipboard resonant frequencies
2 hours per axis at resonant point
